_description: Bounded SC-PPO-family diagnostic for #57. Changes only cost_aggregation from quantile(0.90) to mean and runs seeds 23/29/31 before any full five-seed rerun.
name: sc_ppo_mean_aggregation_seed29_repair

candidates.label: SC-PPO 3.8 PID-Lagrangian (mean aggregation, seed29 repair diagnostic)

_promotion_rule: This diagnostic passes only if seeds 23, 29, and 31 all satisfy the final-checkpoint gates documented in docs/full-paper/extended-seed-results.md. Passing this diagnostic permits a full 11/17/23/29/31 rerun; it does not supersede #51 by itself.
